reviews.comment:
Tener en cuenta el horario de atención si mal no recuerdo abre a las 8.30 hasta las 22. Para las a fumadores no tiene cigarrillos el resto está muy bien es solo un paraje.

(Translated by Google)
Please note the opening hours; if I remember correctly, it's open from 8:30 am to 10 pm. They don't have cigarettes for smokers, but otherwise it's very nice; it's just a nice spot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtOU1PU1FnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es el el mejor punto para parar a estirar un poco las piernas o tomarse unos amarguitos de camino a Comodoro o a trelew. Si venís muy muerto de sueño y no llegas, hay bocha de lugar para estacionar y meter una siesta. Adentro tenes muchos enchufes con puerto usb para cargar telefono. Hay wifi. La nafta esta mas barata que en Comodoro. Podes cargar agua caliente. Tiene todo lo que podes llegar a necesitar si vas viajando.

(Translated by Google)
It's the best place to stop and stretch your legs or have a few drinks on the way to Comodoro or Trelew. If you're really tired and won't make it, there's plenty of parking and a nap. Inside, there are lots of outlets with USB ports to charge your phone. There's Wi-Fi. Gas is cheaper than in Comodoro. You can get hot water. It has everything you could possibly need while traveling.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcEp1NVZREAE
